6.reason: The program does not implement the required permutation generation logic; it only reads and prints the input integer, failing to solve the problem.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The program does not implement the required permutation generation logic; it only reads and prints the input integer, failing to solve the problem.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The program only prints the input N instead of generating and printing all permutations of integers from 1 to N in lexicographical order as required by the problem description.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The program does not generate permutations of integers from 1 to N as required. Instead, it only prints the input number N. This fails to meet the problem's output specification which requires N! lines of lexicographically sorted permutations.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The program does not generate permutations as required by the problem. It only reads N and prints it, completely ignoring the task of generating and outputting all lexicographically sorted permutations of integers from 1 to N.]
